TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_yuncumin_ad, title = yuncumin_ad, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/yuncumin_ad} }

S.FORM: yincumin a demiad kakiliman nilacul lacul waluay a bulad cacay a demiad ayza ‚Äď yuncumin ad,sapakatulu,macilal ku demiad ayza, tayda ipangiduwan atu yubinkui kami,patinak tu yuncumin ad atu sakalalikid nu sakul,maydih kami tayniyan nu katuuday miyadih tupalaw,tudawaen tu kukatuuday tayni i niyadu' , amana pibulibul tu palaw nu binacadan,sateptep han i tabiyingan miadih,nika caay kaw pidangan a palaw , u puu'numihecan kalalikidan nu pinacadan,mahica edabang namu kami. u belih nu Hulam
S.PHON: jin ¶umin a d…ômiad kakir~…ĺiman nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad ajza * jun ¶umin ad,sapakatur~…ĺu,ma ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ku d…ômiad ajza, tajda ipaŇčiduwan atu jubinkui kami,patinak tu jun ¶umin ad atu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺikid nu sakur~…ĺ,majdińß kami tajnijan nu katuudaj mijadińß tupar~…ĺaw,tudawa…ôn tu kukatuudaj tajni i nijadu Ē~ ° , amana pibur~…ĺibur~…ĺ tu par~…ĺaw nu bina ¶adan,sat…ôpt…ôp ńßan i tabijiŇčan miadińß,nika ¶aaj kaw pidaŇčan a par~…ĺaw , u puu Ē~ °numińß…ô ¶an kar~…ĺar~…ĺikidan nu pina ¶adan,mańßi ¶a …ôdabaŇč namu kami. u b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam
S.FORM: yincumin a demiad kakiliman nilacul lacul waluay a bulad cacay a demiad ayza ‚Äď yuncumin ad,sapakatulu,macilal ku demiad ayza, tayda ipangiduwan atu yubinkui kami,patinak tu yuncumin ad atu sakalalikid nu sakul,maydih kami tayniyan nu katuuday miyadih tupalaw,tudawaen tu kukatuuday tayni i niyadu' , amana pibulibul tu palaw nu binacadan,sateptep han i tabiyingan miadih,nika caay kaw pidangan a palaw , u puu'numihecan kalalikidan nu pinacadan,mahica edabang namu kami. u belih nu Hulam
